creator: rfg-freebsd@tristatelogic.com
text:
I have cause to believe that recently crashes I have experienced when attempting to make use of the print menu in opera-12.16_6 can be traced to libproxy-0.4.15.

Please see:

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=238413

for further details, including a post-crash stack trace.
